title: CalcMod: NeoForged
description: Calculator mod in chat with minecraft related functions. (Unofficial NeoForge port - original mod by jsa2025)
body: ## CalcMod: NeoForged This is an **unofficial port** of [CalcMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/calcmod) by [jsa2025](https://github.com/js802025) to **NeoForge 21.1.228 / Minecraft 1.21.1** — a version not covered by upstream. **Full feature parity with upstream.** No features added, none removed. --- ## 📚 Documentation & usage This page intentionally stays minimal. For the **full feature list, command syntax, variables, and gallery**, see the official pages: - 🔗 **Modrinth:** https://modrinth.com/mod/calcmod - 🔗 **GitHub (upstream):** https://github.com/js802025/calcmod --- ## ✨ Quick preview |/calc 3+(28/8)^2| |:-:| || |/calc craft piston 3 sb| |:-:| || |/calc nether ~ ~ ~| |:-:| || *Click any green text in-game to copy it to your clipboard.* --- ## 🧾 Backport changes - Build system: ForgeGradle 6 → ModDevGradle 2 (NeoForge) - `mods.toml` → `neoforge.mods.toml`, Forge event-bus imports → NeoForge equivalents - `Craft.java` / `RecipeSuggestionProvider.java` backported from MC 1.21.4's `RecipeDisplay` API to MC 1.21.1's `Recipe` API - Jar renamed to `calcmod-neoforged-*` so it's visibly distinct from official releases ## 📝 Credits & license All credit for the mod itself goes to **[jsa2025](https://github.com/js802025)**. Port maintained by [F0x06](https://github.com/F0x06). Licensed under **MIT** (same as upstream).
